content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR GIET UNIVERSITY OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. 139 /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 17/01/2026 NOTICE It is for information of the students concerned that, the Examination form fill-up for the Semester End Examinations of the following courses will be held as per the schedule given below. Programme / Course Semester | Dates of Form Form Fill up Fill up Fees b B. Sc. Nursing 2022 - 2026 6th 19.01.2026 Rs. 1000/- I to 2. B. Sc. Nursing 2023 - 2027 5th 21.01.2026 Rs. 1000/- » Students are advised to clear their dues before the form fill up. > Students are advised to submit the form fill up money receipt to their respective Head of the Departments and complete the form fill up through ERP (Online). » Application Received after the due date will not be considered. » The Examination Schedule is available at University Website. Controller of Examinations @, GIET University Memo No: | 40(1) /GIETU/Exam Date: 17.01.2026 Copy to: 1) The Vice-Chancellor/Registrar/ Dean Academics for information. 2) Principal — School of Nursing/Coordinator for information and necessary action. il Cont r of Examinations @ GIET University 3) Accounts Section / Library / ERP / E-Class. 4) GIET University Website / Notice Board.
